'''Burr Danid''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and an aspiring [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guard]].

==Biography==
While training at [[The Squall/Legends|The Squall]] on [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]], Danid was put forward to face [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in a duel by the other students, who designated him as the best among them. Despite his skill, Vader defeated him with ease, [[Death/Legends|killing]] him and throwing his broken body into the depths of The Squall as a reminder that even the best of the Guards training on Yinchorr were helpless against the power of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. [[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, [[Kir Kanos]] used Danid's name as an alias while traversing the terrain of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].
